Career Highlights: Personal care Worker with 5 years delivering hands-on personal care in residential aged care. Most recently at Sunnybrook Home in Castle Hill, providing comprehensive personal care and mobility support to residents across morning and afternoon shifts.
Skills:
**Care Skills:** personal care, showering and bathing, aged care, medication assistance, clinical documentation
**Soft Skills:** empathy, teamwork, verbal communication, written communication
Professional Experience:
### Personal Care Worker | Sunnybrook Home | 2020 — Present
- Delivered personal care including showering, dressing, and grooming to 12 residents daily, maintaining dignity and following individualised care plans in a busy 60-bed residential facility throughout each shift.
- Assisted residents with mobility including hoist transfers and walking-aid support under safe manual handling protocols, documenting observations for nursing handover at end of shift.
- Provided medication assistance under RN supervision and contributed to accurate clinical documentation at end of each shift.
### Support Worker | Homefront Community Care | 2018 — 2020
- Supported elderly clients with personal care, meal preparation, and community transport, communicating progress to care coordinators.
- Built trusting relationships with clients and families, adapting care delivery to individual preferences and routines.
Registration & Licences: **Credentials:** Certificate III in Individual Support (Ageing), NDIS Worker Check, Current First Aid and CPR (HLTAID011)
Education: **Certificate III in Individual Support (Ageing)** | TAFE NSW | 2018
